message:
refactor: remove hand-written Zig from benchmarks, use LanceQL as baseline

- Remove Native Zig baseline from all benchmarks
- LanceQL is now the baseline (1.0x) for all comparisons
- Each benchmark compares: LanceQL vs DuckDB vs Polars
- Increase iterations to ensure ≥5 seconds per test
- Clean up output to show only product comparisons
